parameters.text: Sorry, you're not authorised to use this bot. Contact Tyson to get access.

=⏳ Got it {{ $json.firstName }}! Writing 5 ad copy variants for *{{ $json.offer || 'your offer' }}*...

Angle: _{{ $json.angle || 'not specified' }}_
Format: _{{ $json.format || 'not specified' }}_

This takes about 30 seconds.

=⏳ On it {{ $json.firstName }}! Creating a creative brief for *{{ $json.offer || 'your offer' }}*...

Format: _{{ $json.format || 'Reel' }}_
Creator: _{{ $json.creator || 'Tyson' }}_

This takes about 45 seconds.

=📋 *Creative Brief Ready*

Full brief has been sent to Tyson's email with the complete script, visual direction, and production notes.

_{{ $('Parse Intent').first().json.isTyson ? 'Check your email for the full brief.' : 'Tyson will review and confirm when ready to film.' }}_

=⏳ Pulling performance data from both ad accounts...

This takes about 60 seconds.
🔒 The optimisation report is only available to Tyson. I've sent him a notification to pull the latest report.

📊 *Report generated and delivered above.*

Review the analysis and action items in the messages above.

_This message was sent automatically with n8n_

👋 *Flow States Ads Agent*
Here's what I can do:

📝 *Write ad copy*
_"Write 5 copy variants for the Manus hub, pain point angle, Reel format"_

🎬 *Create a creative brief*
_"Create a Reel brief for Tyson, curiosity hook, Manus hub offer"_

📊 *Pull performance report*
_"Show me the latest ad performance report"_

🚀 *Create a new ad* _(Tyson only)_
_"Create new ad"_ or _"Set up an ad in Flow States Retreats"_

✅ *Approve copy*
_"Approve variant 3"_ or _"Iterate on 2 — make the hook shorter"_

I didn't quite catch that. Here's what I can help with:

📝 *Write copy* — "Write 5 variants for [offer], [angle] angle, [format]"
🎬 *Create brief* — "Create a Reel brief for [name], [hook type]"
📊 *Performance report* — "Show me the latest ad performance"
🔍 *Research competitors* — "Research ads for [brand name]"
🚀 *Create an ad* — "Create new ad" or "Set up an ad in [account]"
✅ *Approve/iterate copy* — "Approve variant 2" or "Iterate on variant 3"

parameters.content:
## Meta Ads Telegram Bot Router

**Bot:** @flowstatesads_bot
**Authorised users:**
- Tyson (ID: 1375806243) — full access + approvals
- Emma (ID: 1318710237) — copy & brief requests only

**Routes:**
- COPY → Copy Agent webhook
- BRIEF → Creative Brief Agent webhook
- REPORT → Optimisation Agent (Tyson only)
- HELP → Help message
- UNKNOWN → Prompt for clarification

**Setup required:**
1. Add Telegram credential with bot token
2. Add Anthropic credential to Intent Classifier node
3. Activate this workflow
4. Activate Copy Agent and Creative Brief Agent workflows
5. Add webhook trigger to Optimisation Agent for on-demand pulls

parameters.text: 🔒 Ad creation is only available to Tyson. Please ask Tyson to set up the ad.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "offer": "{{ $json.offer || \"the previous offer\" }}",
  "angle": "{{ $json.angle || \"same angle\" }}",
  "format": "{{ $json.format || \"feed ad\" }}",
  "chatId": {{ $json.chatId }},
  "userId": {{ $json.userId }},
  "iterate_instruction": {{ JSON.stringify("Iterate on Variant " + ($json.variant_number || "2") + ". " + ($json.feedback || "Refine and improve it.")) }},
  "top_performing_insight": ""
}

parameters.query: select public.record_heartbeat('{{ $workflow.id }}'::text, 'started'::text, 'Meta Ads Telegram Bot Router'::text, '{{ $execution.id }}'::text);
select public.record_heartbeat('{{ $workflow.id }}'::text, 'success'::text, 'Meta Ads Telegram Bot Router'::text, '{{ $execution.id }}'::text);
